name: extract-json
description: Extract values, keys, or subsets from JSON files with dot-separated paths, replacing cat+python json parse chains.

parameters.name: --pick
parameters.description: Comma-separated top-level keys to extract as subset

parameters.name: --raw
parameters.description: Print raw string without JSON quoting

parameters.name: --search
parameters.description: Find keys/values containing string at any depth

examples.expected: JSON subset with only scripts and jest keys

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses cat+python json parse chains into one step, saving 1-2 agent steps per JSON extraction.
